title: From Me to You: Kimi ni Todoke
overview: Nicknamed "Sadako" for her spooky appearance, high schooler Sawako begins to break out of her shell when she befriends popular boy Kazehaya.

tv.showTitle: From Me to You: Kimi ni Todoke
tv.episodeOverview: Sawako has conquered the rumors and obstacles that stood between her and the boy she loves. She tells Kurumi what happened, and the two come to an understanding. Kazehaya and Sawako meet up outside of school for a day together, all alone...
